title: Naked Bible Podcast Episode 334: Paradise Lost — Nephilim and Spirits of the Dead
author: heiser

entries.title: The Nephilim Were Giants — Offspring of the Divine-Human Union
entries.content_summary: The Nephilim (H5303) in Genesis 6:4 were the offspring of the sons of God (divine beings) and human women. The word is related to the Aramaic root nphl ('to fall') — 'the fallen ones.' They are explicitly called giants in the LXX translation (gigantes). Numbers 13:33 confirms the Nephilim survived as the Anakim clan encountered during the conquest. The giant clans of Canaan (Anakim, Rephaim, Emim, Zamzummim) are all connected to the Nephilim lineage. Deuteronomy 2-3 catalogs these giant clans and their territories. The cherem warfare (total devotion/destruction) during the conquest specifically targeted these Nephilim-infested regions — it was the elimination of the corrupt divine-human hybrid lineage.
entries.content_detail: The Hebrew gibborim ('mighty warriors') in Gen 6:4 describes the Nephilim's warrior nature. The phrase 'men of the name' (anshei ha-shem) means 'men of renown.' The 'and also afterward' clause in Gen 6:4 indicates the Nephilim lineage continued after the Flood — explaining the giant clans in Canaan. Og king of Bashan (Deut 3:11) had a bed of iron 9 cubits long (~13.5 feet). Bashan is significant in cosmic geography — it is the region associated with Mount Hermon, where the Watchers descended according to 1 Enoch 6:6. The word 'Rephaim' means both 'giants' and 'shades/dead' — connecting the giant clans to the realm of the dead.
